{{Infobox location
| name = Luminian cathedral
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Luminian]] cathedrals exist.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Luminian cathedral]] is located in the center of the citadel.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The entrance columns of the [[Luminian cathedral]] are carved with reliefs of famous historical heroes, including [[Loreli]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Luminian cathedral]] features stained glass depicting [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
